goal: Select the first 25 highest-value classroom lessons to import or create from the inventory audit without importing the full library yet.
selection_rules: Choose topics that reduce scams, wasted money, and unrealistic expectations.
Include no more than four lessons from any one chapter.
Use docs/level-up/source-lesson-inventory.md as the internal lesson-splitting map for module-derived lessons without exposing legacy course naming publicly.
